title: Parkour Maze Creator 跑酷迷宫机
description:
a datapack that can easily construct parkour-maze for you
造跑酷迷宫，可以做地图，也可以自己玩~
body:
It's a datapack that can easily construct parkour-maze for you. You may use it in your map project, play with your friends, or just have fun for yourself~ ;)

[Youtube video ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y8vSgmc2Uus&t=2s) is recommended to understand how to actually use the datapack  
[B站也有视频](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1g44y1c79h/?spm_id_from=333.1387.0.0) （中文介绍）

After you installed the datapack, use **/reload** to show control panel.("/reload" won't let the maze building progress stop, so feel free to use.)  
quick example: **/function parkour_maze/examples/challenge/glass**
